title: Bormagi Agent Structured Completion Payload
description: JSON payload emitted inside a ```json fence by an agent to signal a structured workflow outcome. The orchestration engine parses this from the agent's text response.

__bormagi_outcome__.description: Sentinel field that identifies this object as a Bormagi structured outcome. Must be exactly true.

outcome.description: The outcome type. Determines which additional fields are required.

summary.description: Human-readable summary of what the agent did or why it is stopping. Shown in the workflow board and task detail panel.

producedArtifactIds.description: IDs of artifacts registered via the artifact registry during this task. May be empty.

toAgentId.description: [outcome=delegated] The agent ID to hand the task to. Must match a configured agent ID.

objective.description: [outcome=delegated] Clear description of what the receiving agent must accomplish.

reasonForHandoff.description: [outcome=delegated] Why this agent is handing off rather than continuing.

inputArtifactIds.description: [outcome=delegated] Artifact IDs the receiving agent should use as inputs.

relevantDecisionIds.description: [outcome=delegated] Decision log entry IDs that are relevant context for the receiving agent.

constraints.description: [outcome=delegated] Constraints the receiving agent must respect (e.g. 'Do not modify the public API').

expectedOutputs.description: [outcome=delegated] Artifacts or deliverables expected from the receiving agent.

doneCriteria.description: [outcome=delegated] Acceptance criteria the receiving agent should meet before returning.

isBlocking.description: [outcome=delegated|review_requested] Whether the current task waits for the child task to complete.

reviewerAgentId.description: [outcome=review_requested] The agent ID who should perform the review.

itemUnderReview.description: [outcome=review_requested] Description of what is being reviewed (artifact name, change description).

reviewScope.description: [outcome=review_requested] Specific aspects the reviewer should focus on.

reviewCriteria.description: [outcome=review_requested] Specific criteria or checklist items for the reviewer.

reason.description: [outcome=blocked] Explanation of why the agent cannot proceed.

severity.description: [outcome=blocked] Severity of the blocker. Critical blockers halt stage progression.

suggestedRoute.description: [outcome=blocked] What the human owner or orchestrator should do to unblock the agent.
